uploaderPublicationDecision.reason: Uploader publication is owner-approved, hosted Release Check evidence is recorded, npm registry readback returns @agentique.io/uploader@0.1.0, and clean install smoke from the npm registry package passes. The package remains review-only and does not publish, approve, certify, host, or moderate resources.
